title: Pink Diamond Smp
description: Pink Diamond Smp Texture Pack Made For PVP
body:
# Pink PvP texurepack Made by Kars / Nyyv
**Not Completed**
**What it includes**

![Pink Tools / Amour](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/0a73663fe1299a3840ce2ed98a73e5b875d15775.png)
![Pink Enchant Glint](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ca8146c36f336742d6bbe49f9f96b220ae17bc21.png)
Pink Crit / Sweep hit
Pink WindCharge + Windcharge Explosion Particles
Pink Widgets + hotbar Selector

**Some QOls**

1. No explosions Particles
1. Low Fire
1. Small Shield
1. Removed pumpkin blur + nausea
 

**Add k.arz on discord if you find a glitch / suggestions**
